char.name: Achina the Midwife
char.bio: I keep to my midwife's trade near Shechem. A good season for the herds, thank the heavens.

friends.name: Laban
friends.bio: Of Haran. Family is family, and a good deal is a good deal. My sister marries well.

friends.name: Adina
friends.bio: A girl of Haran, by the well. Rebekah is my dearest friend, and you will NOT believe it, a stranger's servant turned up with ten camels and gold, and now she's leaving to marry a man she's never even met, off in Canaan! 😱 So happy for her. Going to miss her terribly.

friends.name: Rachel
friends.bio: Shepherdess of Haran. Jacob worked seven years for me, and to him they seemed but a few days for the love he had. 💍

friends.name: Melchizedek
friends.bio: King of Salem. Priest of God Most High. I bring out bread and wine and bless those who fight the good fight.

friends.name: Boran
friends.bio: Trader at the city gate. Spices from the south, copper from the hills, fine linen, name it, I'll get it. Best prices in Canaan (don't tell my competition). The patriarchs' caravans have been very good for business.

friends.name: Sarai
friends.bio: Wife of Abram. Following my husband into the unknown. Barren, but keeping faith.

friends.name: Lot
friends.bio: Son of Haran, traveling with my uncle Abram. Looking for well-watered land for my flocks.

friends.name: Isaac
friends.bio: Child of the promise, laughter is in my very name. Walking the land my father was given and trusting the God who provides. 🐑

friends.name: Rebekah
friends.bio: Drew water for a stranger and all his camels, and it changed my whole life. Veiled and on the road to meet my husband. ✨

friends.name: Jacob
friends.bio: Younger twin with a strong grip, they call me the heel-grabber. Saw a ladder to heaven once. Still chasing the blessing. 🪜

friends.name: Judah
friends.bio: Fourth son of Leah, and this time, I will praise the LORD. Learning my way, for better and for worse. 🦁

friends.name: Joseph
friends.bio: Son of Rachel, the dreamer of the family. Had the strangest dream last night about sheaves and stars... ✨
